title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.253 - Fee for certain records request, amount — increase permitted, cap
text:
43.253.  Fee for certain records request, amount — increase permitted, cap. — 1.  Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, a minimum fee of six dollars may be charged by the Missouri state highway patrol for a records request for a Missouri Uniform Crash Report or Marine Accident Investigation Report where there are allowable fees of less than six dollars under this chapter or chapter 610.  Such six-dollar fee shall be in place of any allowable fee of less than six dollars.
  2.  The superintendent of the Missouri state highway patrol may increase the minimum fee described in this section by no more than one dollar every other year beginning August 28, 2024; however, the minimum fee described in this section shall not exceed ten dollars.
(L. 2023 S.B. 28 merged with S.B. 186)
